# ONECAB Digital Finance SSOT Architecture (Non-Negotiable)

ONECAB is a 100% digital payment platform using Stripe + Stripe Connect only. Cash workflows, internal wallet accounting, recovery debt, and legacy wallet balances are permanently removed. Every finance page has ONE responsibility and must never duplicate another SSOT.

## 1. Trip Settlement (SSOT)

**Purpose:** The ONLY source of truth for all money generated by trips.

**Owns:** Base fare, dynamic fare, negotiated fare, waiting time, stop charges, airport surcharge, toll charges, tips, discounts, vouchers, taxes/VAT, gross fare, ONECAB commission, Stripe processing fee, driver gross earnings, driver net earnings, customer payment status, settlement status.

**Must NEVER display:** Platform Stripe balances, driver Stripe balances, weekly payouts, connected account balances, platform bank payouts, wallet balances.

**Admin surface:** Trip History (`/trip-history`) + Finance Recovery panel per trip.

This is the ONLY page allowed to calculate trip money.

## 2. Financial Reconciliation (SSOT)

**Purpose:** Verify that ONECAB Platform and Stripe match exactly. This page AUDITS only — it never calculates earnings or creates money.

**Owns:** Platform Stripe available/pending, incoming card settlements, Stripe fees, driver Stripe transfers, platform bank payouts, failed/pending transfers, webhook health, sync status, reconciliation health.

**Must NEVER display:** Trip fare, discounts, driver earnings, driver balances, wallet balances, commission calculations, Finance Cleared, cash metrics.

**Admin surface:** `/financial-reconciliation` — Overview, Drivers (Stripe positions), Stripe, Alerts.

**Question answered:** "Does Stripe match the ONECAB platform?"

## 3. Driver Wallet Ledger (SSOT)

**Purpose:** Single financial truth for ONE driver's Stripe Connect account.

**Owns:** Stripe available/pending, scheduled weekly transfer, last payout, payout history, connected bank/account, Connect status, transfer history, instant cashout eligibility (if enabled).

**Must NEVER display:** Wallet Balance, ONECAB Owes You, Finance Cleared, Outstanding Liability, Recovery Debt, Cash Debt, platform commission, trip settlement calculations.

**Admin surface:** `/driver-wallet-ledger` — Overview, Payouts, Stripe, Ledger (audit log).

Reads Stripe Connect only on Overview — never calculates earnings.

## Global Finance Rules (Hard Rules)

1. Trip Settlement is the ONLY page allowed to calculate financial values.
2. Financial Reconciliation ONLY verifies Stripe integrity.
3. Driver Wallet Ledger ONLY displays Stripe Connect information.
4. Driver App reads ONLY Stripe Connect balances.
5. Platform Stripe and Driver Connect accounts are permanently separated.
6. No duplicated financial calculations.
7. If a value belongs to one SSOT page, all others consume it read-only.
8. Cash workflows are permanently removed.
9. Legacy wallet accounting is permanently removed.
10. Permanently removed labels: Wallet Balance, ONECAB Owes You, Finance Cleared, Outstanding Liability, Outstanding Recovery, Recovery Debt, Cash Debt, Cash Recovery, Wallet Adjustments, Internal Wallet Accounting (from driver-facing and FR surfaces).

## Master Finance Flow

```
Customer Card Payment
        ↓
Trip Settlement (SSOT)
        ↓
Platform Stripe Account
        ↓
Financial Reconciliation (SSOT)
        ↓
Stripe Connect Transfer
        ↓
Driver Wallet Ledger (SSOT)
        ↓
Scheduled Weekly Payout
        ↓
Driver Bank Account
```
